# git-watcher

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Watches local git refs (refs/heads/main by default) via @parcel/watcher. Emits the git.refAdvanced trigger event and notifies the refHeadResource live-state resource on every advance.
- Load-bearing: yes
- Defines:
  - DB schema: `plugins/infra/plugins/git-watcher/server/internal/tables-ref-advanced.ts`
- Exports (server):
  - Types: `RefAdvancedPayload`, `RefHead`
  - Values: `_refAdvancedTriggers`, `refAdvanced`, `refHeadResource`, `RefHeadSchema`
- Exports (shared):
  - Types: `RefAdvancedPayload`, `RefHead`
  - Values: `RefHeadSchema`
- Server:
  - Register: `defineTriggerEvent('git.refAdvanced')`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
